title: Map of part of the coast of China
notes: French/European charting context; Lantau appears as Lantao in related historical sources.

title: Steel's new Chart of the Coast of China / Lantau detail
notes: Based on Huddart/Larkins surveys; related sources record Lanto and Tyho forms.

title: China South Coast, Entrance to the Chau-Kiang / Lantau detail
notes: Ross/Admiralty chart based on 1815 survey and First Opium War era updates.

title: South China Sea: western approaches to Hong Kong Harbour: Lantau I. (Tai Yue Shan) to Kowloon Pt.
notes: UCSD object page states the chart covers Lantau I. (Tai Yue Shan) to Kowloon Pt.
licence: Public domain (US) / UC San Diego Library

title: Map of the San-On District / 新安縣全圖 (Lantau crop)
notes: Volonteri map; useful for Tai-ü-shan / Nam-tao Island context. This is a Lantau-area crop, not the whole county map. Stitched from hkmaps.hk tiles at z=16; tile bounds x=53484-53548, y=28578-28639.
licence: See source/rights at hkmaps.hk and linked archive source

title: Hongkong Approaches: Lantau Island, East Coast
notes: Unpublished UKHO survey of Lantau Island east coast by Commander C. E. Monro, HMS Rambler, Apr-Jun 1905. Stitched from hkmaps.hk tiles at z=16; tile bounds x=53503-53534, y=28592-28629.
licence: See source/rights at hkmaps.hk and linked archive source

title: Toong-Koo or Urmstone Bay
notes: Chart of the Pearl River showing the north side of Lantau Island. Stitched from hkmaps.hk tiles at z=16; tile bounds x=53488-53525, y=28586-28617.
licence: See source/rights at hkmaps.hk and linked archive source

title: Hongkong Waters West
notes: Admiralty sea chart of western approaches to Hong Kong Harbour extending westwards to Lantau Island. Stitched from hkmaps.hk tiles at z=16; tile bounds x=53530-53552, y=28592-28607.
licence: See source/rights at hkmaps.hk and linked archive source

title: Map of Hong Kong and New Territory
notes: Survey map/boundary context with notes on north and south sides of Lantao/Lantau. Stitched from hkmaps.hk tiles at z=16; tile bounds x=53488-53553, y=28582-28635.
licence: See source/rights at hkmaps.hk and linked archive source
